topdown_view.config.title: Top-Down View Settings
topdown_view.config.default_enabled.tool: Automatically enable top-down view when the game starts.
Apply glow effect to targeted mobs.
topdown_view.config.head_body_rotation_e:
Separate head and body rotation for realistic movement.
Disable if ranged weapon mods aim incorrectly.
topdown_view.config.arrival_threshold.to:
Sets how close you need to get to consider the destination reached.
Smaller values require more precision.
topdown_view.config.sprint_distance_thre: Automatically sprint when the destination is at least this far away.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_to_moveme: Automatically rotate camera to movement direction after moving steadily in the same direction.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_angle_thr: Auto-rotation starts when the angle between camera and movement direction exceeds this value.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_cooldown_: Cooldown after auto-rotation before next rotation can occur (20 ticks = 1 second).
topdown_view.config.stable_direction_ang: Angle tolerance to consider movement direction as stable. Lower values require more precision.
topdown_view.config.stable_direction_tic: Time required to maintain stable direction before auto-rotation triggers.
topdown_view.config.auto_align_animation: How quickly the camera rotates. Lower = slower, higher = faster.
topdown_view.config.cylinder_radius_hori: Sets the horizontal culling range from the camera.
topdown_view.config.cylinder_radius_vert: Sets the vertical culling range from the camera.
topdown_view.config.cylinder_forward_shi: Shifts the culling center forward relative to the camera.
topdown_view.config.click_to_move.toolti:
Toggles right-click to move and auto-attack functionality.
§c* Currently has many bugs, such as bows not working.
topdown_view.config.destination_highligh: Display a visual effect at the destination when clicking to move.
topdown_view.config.arrival_threshold.to:
Sets how close you need to get to consider the destination reached.
Smaller values require more precision.
topdown_view.config.fade_enabled.tooltip:
Toggles visual fading for blocks at the culling boundary.
§c[Performance Impact: High]
topdown_view.config.fade_start.tooltip:
Sets where the fade begins relative to the culling boundary.
0.0 starts near the camera, 0.9 starts close to the edge.
topdown_view.config.fade_near_alpha.tool:
Minimum transparency for culled blocks.
0.0 makes them fully transparent, 1.0 makes them fully opaque.
topdown_view.config.rotate_angle_mode.to:
Sets the snap interval for horizontal camera rotation.
- 90°: Axis-aligned only
- 45°: Isometric diagonal view support
- 15°: Freer rotation
topdown_view.config.camera_snap_rotation: How quickly the camera rotates during snap rotation. Lower = slower, higher = faster.
topdown_view.config.camera_pitch.tooltip:
Sets the vertical looking angle of the camera.
90.0 is top-down (bird's eye), 45.0 is an angled view.
topdown_view.config.top_down_fov.tooltip:
Sets the field of view (FOV) during top-down view.
Works independently from first-person FOV setting.
Lower values = narrow (zoom in), Higher values = wide (zoom out)
topdown_view.config.player_screen_offset:
Shifts the camera's look-at point along the view direction.
Positive = player appears higher, Negative = player appears lower.
Maximum camera distance for zooming out.
Higher values let you see further away.
topdown_view.config.default_camera_dista:
Initial camera distance when enabling top-down view.
Must be between minimum and maximum distance.
topdown_view.config.scroll_only_zoom_ena:
Enable camera zoom with mouse scroll wheel alone (no modifier key required).
When disabled, Alt + Scroll is required to zoom.
topdown_view.config.ignore_leaves_in_ray:
Ignore leaf blocks during mouse targeting (block selection, click-to-move, etc.).
* Holding a hoe or shears allows targeting and breaking leaves normally.
topdown_view.config.staircase_exclusion_:
Detects staircases around the player and excludes their blocks from culling.
Stairs within the configured height above the player's feet are kept visible.
(Note: May impact performance)
Vertical range (in blocks) above the player's feet within which staircase blocks are excluded from culling.
topdown_view.config.staircase_occlude_en:
When a staircase blocks the camera-to-player line of sight, renders it with the specified transparency.
Requires Staircase Detection to be enabled.
topdown_view.config.staircase_occlude_al:
Transparency of staircase blocks when occluding the view.
0.0 = fully transparent, 1.0 = fully opaque.
Hide mobs that are above the player's feet and grounded.
Decorative entities (ItemFrame, Painting, ArmorStand) are always culled.
Enable mining mode functionality. When disabled, the mining mode key will not respond.
topdown_view.config.mining_mode_pitch.to:
Sets the camera vertical angle during mining mode.
90.0 is top-down, lower values give an angled view.
topdown_view.config.mining_cylinder_radi: Cylinder radius for mining mode culling.
topdown_view.config.mining_cylinder_forw: Shifts the mining mode cylinder center forward (in blocks).
topdown_view.config.drag_rotation_enable: Enable camera rotation by mouse dragging.
topdown_view.config.drag_rotation_sensit: Adjust the sensitivity of drag-based camera rotation.
topdown_view.config.range_indicator_enab: Highlight targets outside attack range in red.
topdown_view.config.range_sword.tooltip: Set attack range when wielding a sword.
topdown_view.config.range_axe.tooltip: Set attack range when wielding an axe.
topdown_view.config.range_pickaxe.toolti: Set attack range when wielding a pickaxe.
topdown_view.config.range_shovel.tooltip: Set attack range when wielding a shovel.
topdown_view.config.range_other.tooltip: Set attack range for other items.
topdown_view.config.force_auto_jump.tool: Automatically climb blocks during click movement only.
topdown_view.config.fade_block_hit_thres:
Only blocks with alpha above this value are hittable.
0.0 = All blocks hittable (off), 1.0 = Only fully opaque blocks
topdown_view.config.follow_delay_while_m: Toggle follow delay while riding a vehicle. When off, the camera follows instantly while mounted.
topdown_view.config.camera_y_follow_dela: Enable delayed camera Y-axis follow. Reduces motion sickness during jumps.
Camera Y-axis follow delay in seconds. Higher values make the camera lag more when jumping.
topdown_view.config.camera_x_follow_dela: Enable delayed camera X-axis follow. Reduces motion sickness during movement.
Camera X-axis follow delay in seconds. Higher values make the camera lag more when moving.
topdown_view.config.camera_z_follow_dela: Enable delayed camera Z-axis follow. Reduces motion sickness during movement.
Camera Z-axis follow delay in seconds. Higher values make the camera lag more when moving.
topdown_view.config.free_camera_yaw_sens: Horizontal rotation sensitivity during free camera mode.
topdown_view.config.free_camera_pitch_se: Vertical rotation sensitivity during free camera mode.
topdown_view.config.reset.tooltip: Reset all settings to default values.
topdown_view.config.locked_top_down.tool:
Prevents switching back to first-person view.
When enabled, F5 and the toggle key are disabled.
Temporarily expands a clicked mob's hitbox.
topdown_view.config.target_lock_duration:
Duration to expand a clicked mob's hitbox.
0 to disable, 120 ticks = 6 seconds. Makes re-clicking easier even when the cursor moves off the mob.
topdown_view.config.target_hitbox_expans:
Hitbox expansion amount while target is locked.
1.0 = 1 block in all directions. Too large may cause accidental clicks.
topdown_view.config.screen_reach_enabled:
Extend player reach to cover the entire screen.
When enabled, you can target and interact with any block or entity visible on screen.
Disable to use vanilla reach distance.
topdown_view.config.reach_distance.toolt:
Maximum reach distance in blocks when Reach Override is enabled.
Vanilla default is around 4.5 blocks. Higher values allow targeting farther blocks.
topdown_view.config.placement_preview_en:
Shows a translucent ghost block preview when holding a block item and looking at a surface.
Only works in top-down mode.
topdown_view.config.placement_transparen:
Sets the transparency of the placement preview.
0.1 = nearly invisible, 0.9 = nearly opaque.
topdown_view.config.click_position_place:
When enabled, the orientation of directional blocks (stairs, pistons, etc.)
is determined based on the clicked position or side of the block, rather than your character's orientation.
topdown_view.config.placement_rotation_e:
Allows manually specifying the placement orientation of blocks
(pistons, logs, etc.) via keybindings, independent of look direction.
Supports all 6 directions (up/down + 4 horizontal).
§cRequires TopDownView on the server (except singleplayer).
topdown_view.placement_rotation.no_serve: §cManual Block Facing requires TopDownView on the server
topdown_view.config.sign_hover_display_m: Sets the mode for displaying the text of a sign when hovered with the cursor.
topdown_view.config.sign_hover_scale.too: Changes the display size of the sign hover text (both 3D Name Tag and 2D Tooltip).
topdown_view.config.show_interaction_pro: Shows a target bracket, block name, and interaction key icon when hovering over interactable blocks like chests, doors, etc.
topdown_view.config.interaction_prompt_s: Adjust the size of the interaction prompt visual element.
topdown_view.config.show_interaction_pro: Toggles the drop shadow of the interaction prompt.
Shows a '?' icon over nearby unopened chests, crafting tables, and other key blocks even when not hovered (visible through walls).
topdown_view.config.spatial_prompt_radiu: Sets the radius to scan for nearby interactable blocks to display spatial prompts.
topdown_view.config.spatial_prompt_all_b: If enabled, shows spatial prompts for all interactable blocks (doors, buttons, etc.). If disabled, limits prompts to containers and key utilities.
